quote: The minute I heard my first love story, I started looking for you, not knowing how blind that was.
author: rumi

quote: Let yourself be silently drawn by the strange pull of what you really love. It will not lead you astray.
author: rumi

quote: Where there is ruin, there is hope for a treasure. Love is the bridge between two hearts.
author: rumi

quote: I love you without knowing how, or when, or from where. I love you simply, without problems or pride.
author: pablo neruda

quote: Love is so short, forgetting is so long.
author: pablo neruda

quote: Being deeply loved by someone gives you strength, while loving someone deeply gives you courage.
author: lao tzu

quote: Where there is love, there is life.
author: mahatma gandhi

quote: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
author: audrey hepburn

quote: Love all, trust a few, do wrong to none.
author: william shakespeare

quote: We accept the love we think we deserve.
author: stephen chbosky

quote: To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
author: david viscott

quote: The giving of love is an education in itself.
author: eleanor roosevelt

quote: Where love exists, impossibilities vanish.
author: sri chinmoy

quote: Love does not dominate; it cultivates.
author: johann wolfgang von goethe

quote: Darkness cannot drive out darkness; only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate; only love can do that.
author: martin luther king jr.

quote: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: steve jobs

quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: steve jobs

quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
author: alan kay

quote: Simple can be harder than complex. You have to work hard to get your thinking clean to make it simple.
author: steve jobs

quote: Innovation is the ability to see change as an opportunity, not a threat.
author: steve jobs

quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: nelson mandela

quote: Do not be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
author: john d. rockefeller

quote: The only way to discover the limits of the possible is to go beyond them into the impossible.
author: arthur c. clarke

quote: Innovation comes from saying no to a thousand things.
author: steve jobs

quote: You cannot innovate without failure. It's a process.
author: brene brown

quote: Creativity is thinking up new things. Innovation is doing new things.
author: theodore levitt

quote: If at first the idea is not absurd, then there is no hope for it.
author: albert einstein

quote: Innovation is seeing what everybody has seen and thinking what nobody has thought.
author: albert einstein

quote: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.
author: cory house

quote: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
author: john johnson

quote: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
author: martin fowler

quote: Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
author: austin freeman

quote: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
author: harold abelson

quote: The most disastrous thing that you can ever learn is your first programming language.
author: alan kay

quote: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
author: kent beck

quote: Debugging is twice as hard as writing the code in the first place.
author: brian kernighan

quote: The only way to go fast is to go well.
author: robert c. martin

quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
author: leonardo da vinci

quote: Fix the cause, not the symptom.
author: steve maguire

quote: Code never lies, comments sometimes do.
author: ron jeffries

quote: An unexamined life is not worth living.
author: socrates

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: socrates

quote: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
author: aristotle

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: aristotle

quote: I think, therefore I am.
author: rene descartes

quote: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
author: friedrich nietzsche

quote: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
author: friedrich nietzsche

quote: Life must be understood backward. But it must be lived forward.
author: soren kierkegaard

quote: Man is condemned to be free.
author: jean-paul sartre

quote: The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
author: joseph campbell

quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: oprah winfrey

quote: The biggest adventure you can take is to live the life of your dreams.
author: oprah winfrey

quote: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
author: zig ziglar

quote: You cannot grow unless you are willing to change.
author: tony robbins

quote: The only limit to your impact is your imagination and commitment.
author: tony robbins

quote: Great things never come from comfort zones.
author: roy t. bennett

quote: Growth is painful. Change is painful. But nothing is as painful as staying stuck somewhere you don't belong.
author: mandy hale

quote: Unless you try to do something beyond what you have already mastered, you will never grow.
author: ralph waldo emerson

quote: Do the best you can until you know better. Then when you know better, do better.
author: maya angelou

quote: We delight in the beauty of the butterfly, but rarely admit the changes it has gone through to achieve that beauty.
author: maya angelou

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: mark twain

quote: Eat a live frog first thing in the morning and nothing worse will happen to you the rest of the day.
author: mark twain

quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: sam levenson

quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
author: tim ferriss

quote: What is important is seldom urgent and what is urgent is seldom important.
author: dwight d. eisenhower

quote: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration, the rest of us just get up and go to work.
author: stephen king

quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: walt disney

quote: You don't have to be extreme, just consistent.
author: james clear

quote: Your most important work is often the work you are avoiding.
author: james clear

quote: Time is what we want most, but what we use worst.
author: william penn

quote: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: stephen covey

quote: Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.
author: dale carnegie

quote: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of a commitment to excellence.
author: paul j. meyer

quote: Well done is better than well said.
author: benjamin franklin

quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: wayne gretzky

quote: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
author: unknown

quote: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
author: chris grosser

quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: william james
